title: microdon nitidus
intro: Microdon nitidus, also known as False Chamomile, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Microdon nitidus include soothing digestive issues, relieving anxiety and insomnia, and reducing inflammation. Microdon nitidus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications to aid in wound healing.
